Show me total revenue by product categor.question: Show me total revenue by product category
Show me total revenue by product category
Show me total revenue by product categor.final_sql: SELECT categories.name, SUM(order_items.quantity * order_items.unit_price) FROM categories JOIN products ON categories.id = products.category_id JOIN order_items ON products.id = order_items.product_id JOIN orders ON order_items.order_id = orders.id WHERE orders.status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY categories.name;

Which products have the highest profit m.question: Which products have the highest profit margin?
Which products have the highest profit m.final_sql: SELECT name, (price - cost) / price AS profit_margin FROM products ORDER BY profit_margin DESC;

Which products have the highest profit m.question: Which products have the highest profit margin?
Which products have the highest profit m.final_sql: SELECT name, (price - cost) / price AS profit_margin FROM products ORDER BY profit_margin DESC;

Which products have the highest profit m.question: Which products have the highest profit margin?
Which products have the highest profit m.final_sql: SELECT name, (price - cost) / price * 100 AS gross_margin FROM products ORDER BY gross_margin DESC;

How many orders were placed each month i.question: How many orders were placed each month in 2024?
How many orders were placed each month i.final_sql: SELECT strftime('%m', order_date) AS month, COUNT(id) AS order_count FROM orders WHERE strftime('%Y', order_date) = '2024' GROUP BY month;

How many orders were placed each month i.question: How many orders were placed each month in 2024?
How many orders were placed each month i.final_sql: SELECT strftime('%m', order_date) AS month, COUNT(id) AS order_count FROM orders WHERE strftime('%Y', order_date) = '2024' GROUP BY month;

How many orders were placed each month i.question: How many orders were placed each month in 2024?
How many orders were placed each month i.final_sql: SELECT strftime('%m', order_date) AS month, COUNT(id) FROM orders WHERE order_date BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-12-31' AND status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY month;
